title: Serra Keto
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Serra}} {{Update|[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith: Prima Official Game Guide|Episode III: Revenge of the Sith: Prima Official Game Guide]]}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Serra_Keto.png]] |name=Serra Keto |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]][[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' video game]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Fair |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]{{CWACite|4|The Brink}} |masters=[[Cin Drallig/Legends|Cin Drallig]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Serra. Cin Drallig's greatest pupil has come to greet me.|Darth Vader|}} '''Serra Keto''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Originally a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of the renowned [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Cin Drallig/Legends|Cin Drallig]], she was considered his best student. Keto was a practitioner of [[Jar'Kai/Legends|Jar'Kai]], a dual-blade [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|fighting technique]], and like her Master, was known for her skills with a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Keto fought in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], serving as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]], and even fighting alongside the famed [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] during one [[Mission to the Brink of the Celestial Wake|battle]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], she was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|Operation: Knightfall]], when the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader stormed the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Though she [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|dueled]] Vader to prevent him from killing any other Jedi present, she was unable to best him. ==Biography== ===Early life=== Serra Keto was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. [[Jedi training/Legends|Trained]] by the skilled [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] master, [[Cin Drallig/Legends|Cin Drallig]], Keto became his prize [[Padawan/Legends|pupil]]. In [[Time/Legends|time]], she became a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] herself. Like her Master, she was a skilled [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duelist]], and was known as Drallig's finest pupil. Keto used [[Jar'Kai/Legends|Jar'Kai]], the art of [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|dueling]] with two blades at once. ===Clone Wars=== {{Quote|We're not going anywhere until we find the rest of your unit. Whatever attacked you could still be here.''"
"''You're not listening to me—the others are dead and we need to leave. ''Now''.|Anakin Skywalker and Serra Keto|}} [[File:Serra_CW_adv.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Jedi Padawan Serra Keto fought in the Clone Wars.]] Keto fought in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]]. Some time during the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the war's third year, a [[Brink of the Celestial Wake|space station]] carrying Keto, another [[Unidentified Jedi (Brink of the Celestial Wake)|Jedi]], and a unit of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] was attacked by a [[pink blob]]-like species able to combine and morph into machinery. Keto was the sole survivor of the [[Mission to the Brink of the Celestial Wake|assault]] and sent out a distress signal in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] that caught the attention of Jedi Knight [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. Leaving his ally, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], the "[[Hero With No Fear/Legends|Hero With No Fear]]" traveled to the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] where he encountered Keto. She demanded immediate transport off the facility. Skywalker, however, refused in order to find out what happened to her unit. Because of his curiosity, the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were forced to fight the pink shape-shifting creatures, who had shaped themselves into two [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[spider droid]]s. They were eventually defeated, but the Jedi were forced to break a bulkhead, exposing them to the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. In order to prolong the station's existence, Skywalker wanted to activate the emergency [[Ray shield/Legends|ray shields]]. Keto, however, believed that the only way to destroy the blobs was to allow the station to destroy itself, and them along with it. Skywalker refused to give in to the prospect of [[Death/Legends|death]], so he and Keto quickly rushed to the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] and barely escaped with their lives in his [[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|Jedi Interceptor]]. ===Raid on the Jedi Temple=== {{Quote|You shouldn't have come here.|Serra Keto, to Darth Vader|}} [[File:Serra_Keto.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Keto defended the Jedi Temple on Coruscant from Darth Vader and his clone troopers.]] Shortly after the [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Battle of Utapau]], the Republic's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] managed to turn Skywalker to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], and began the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. Skywalker, now known as [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader, was sent to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|kill]] all the Jedi there. Serra Keto and Cin Drallig made a last stand together, fighting off numerous [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] until they were separated by [[All Terrain Recon Transport/Legends|All Terrain Recon Transports]]. Finally, Keto faced off against Vader in the [[Jedi Temple communication center/Legends|data room]] by the [[Tower of First Knowledge/Legends|Tower of First Knowledge]]. Despite her emotion-laden dual lightsaber attacks, she deemed Vader to be stronger. During the fight, Keto taunted and provoked Vader, hoping that he would make a mistake and give her an advantage. Unfortunately for her, Vader was able to tire and corner the young Jedi, trapping her in the training room at the base of the Tower of First Knowledge. In desperation, she used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Telekinesis/Legends|throw]] a huge pillar between her and her attacker to make an escape. However, Vader dodged the attack and followed her up on a balcony. After a short battle against the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], the young Jedi managed to pin Vader to a pillar and attempted to behead him. Vader ducked under her strike, causing her to slice through the pillar instead. Before the exhausted Keto could attack Vader again, the Dark Lord used the Force to cause the pillar she had cut to fall onto her, knocking her off the balcony and crushing her in the training room below. Serra Keto was dead, one of the many Jedi to fall at the hands of Vader. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|That's two more for me!''"
"''Since when do we keep score?|Serra Keto and Cin Drallig, while fighting clone troopers|}} Serra Keto was confident in her abilities, as shown during her duel with Darth Vader. This confidence, however, never led her to make any snap decisions in a combat situation. A selfless woman, she was prepared to sacrifice herself if necessary. She was willing to destroy the ship along with herself to defeat the "machine-aliens," believing it to be the Jedi way. Keto was also cocky and bold, taunting her opponents in an attempt to distract them while boasting of her skills. ==Powers and abilities== [[File:SerraKeto.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Keto was skilled in the art of dual lightsaber fighting.]] {{Quote|At last… a test for my training!|Serra Keto|}} Keto's master, Cin Drallig, developed his own unique style of lightsaber combat, relying on enhanced speed and unconventional and unpredictable movements, and his apprentice followed his lead. Her combat style was fast, dynamic and acrobatic, and she was hailed as Cin Drallig's best student in the ways of lightsaber combat for her skill. She was a practitioner of Jar'Kai, using both lightsabers to strike harder and perform more powerful attacks. Keto proved capable of holding her own against Darth Vader and almost beheaded him before the Sith Lord crushed her under a pillar. Keto was also skilled at telekinesis. ==Behind the scenes== Serra Keto was created for the [[2005]] [[LucasArts]]' [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'' video game]], where she was voiced by [[Kari Wahlgren]]. According to early drafts of the ''Revenge of the Sith'' game, Keto was supposed to fight Vader alongside her Master, Cin Drallig, in a two-on-one battle. The fight would have required the Sith Lord to use all of his dark side powers to defeat the two highly skilled combatants. In ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', it is incorrectly stated that Serra Keto was expelled from the Jedi Order due to her boldness and defiance of rules.{{CSWECite|II|214|Keto, Serra}} ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|4|The Brink}} *[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' video game]] {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Serra Keto}} *[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *{{Blog|holocron|9|Jedi Casualties: Order 66}} *{{InsiderCite|87|Order 66: Destroy All Jedi}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Serra Keto |es=Serra Keto |fr=Serra Keto |it=Serra Keto |nl=Serra Keto |pl=Serra Keto |pt=Serra Keto |fi=Serra Keto }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Keto, Serra}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Generals]] [[Category:Jedi Purge victims]] [[Category:Keto family]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Knights]]
